PLAINITIFF'S MOTION TO ATTACH ORDER AND WRIT OF ATTACHMENT AND/OR OBATAIN A TEMPORARY PROTECTIVE ORDER.
Off Calendar Oct-20-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court noted that in light of the notice of settlement filed by parties, he vacates the tentative ruling and rules as follows:

PLAINITIFF Chancey Martin Corporation DBA Taral Plastics' MOTION TO ATTACH ORDER AND WRIT OF ATTACHMENT AND/OR OBATAIN A TEMPORARY PROTECTIVE ORDER is taken off calendar at the request of the moving party.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
